data.title: GitHub to phase out Command Palette feature preview on August 6, 2025, advising users to explore other options.
data.description: GitHub has made public that the Command Palette feature preview will be deprecated starting from August 6, 2025. Users are advised to start exploring alternative options as a replacement.

data.title: OysterLink survey reveals active listening as most underrated skill in hospitality industry. 100+ professionals were asked.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by OysterLink revealed that active listening is considered the most overlooked but crucial skill in the hospitality sector. In the poll, hospitality professionals were questioned about the skill they believe is underrated in the industry. With responses from over 100 individuals, a clear majority highlighted active listening as indispensable for success in hospitality. The survey underscores the growing recognition of the importance of this skill in the field.

data.title: Faye partners with HeyGen to provide AI video solutions for client communication; expands service portfolio.
data.description: A prominent consulting partner has broadened its range of services by incorporating advanced avatar video technology to improve client communications. The partnership, which was revealed on July 17, 2025, in Calabasas, California, involves Faye, a key player in CRM, CX, and AI solutions, joining forces with HeyGen, an innovative AI company. This collaboration aims to enhance client interactions by leveraging cutting-edge avatar video technology.

data.title: Crypto news: LINK's potential convergence in TradFi & DeFi may push its price above $18, confirming a bullish pattern.
data.description: The price of the cryptocurrency LINK is close to validating a bullish pattern with a strong historical track record. If confirmed, this pattern may propel the altcoin's price to exceed $18.

data.title: United Airlines exceeds earnings estimates with $3.87 per share vs. expected $3.84, sees headwinds in revenue and guidance.
data.description: United Airlines Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: UAL) saw a surge in shares during early trading following the release of positive second-quarter earnings. Analysts are optimistic about the company's performance during this earnings season. Notable analyst insights include BofA Securities' Andrew Didora reinforcing a Buy rating with a $90 price target. Meanwhile, Raymond James' Savanthi Syth maintained a Market Perform rating. BofA Securities' Didora highlighted United Airlines' impressive earnings of $3.87 per share, surpassing the $3.84 per share expectation. Despite challenges like the Newark disruption and flight cancellations, the company delivered strong results. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Crowd Farming market expected to reach $168.4M by 2030, growing at 5.2% CAGR. Demand for farm-to-table transparency fuels growth.
data.description: A report on Crowd Farming, now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects the global market for this industry to reach US$168.4 Million by 2030. The market was estimated to be worth US$124.0 Million in 2024, showcasing a projected growth rate of 5.2% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts, aiding in making informed business decisions. The expansion of the crowd farming market is fueled by various factors.

data.title: Palm Peak Capital's Pacific Shoring acquires Prospan Shoring, a Bensenville company of aluminum products, boosting its market share.
data.description: Santa Rosa, California-based private equity firm Palm Peak Capital has revealed that its portfolio company, Pacific Shoring Products, LLC, has successfully acquired Prospan Shoring based in Bensenville, Illinois. Prospan, established in 1984, specializes in aluminum pneumatic vertical shoring and vehicle stabilization products and is renowned for its leadership in these areas throughout the United States. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for Pacific Shoring as it expands its product offerings and market presence.

data.title: TEDCO chooses Collide Capital as VCLP to manage SSBCI funding, fostering tech innovation. Third selected partner.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on July 17, 2025, Collide Capital has been chosen as the third Venture Capital Limited Partnership (VCLP) to aid in fostering the advancement of technological innovation. TEDCO, renowned as Maryland's key player in driving technology company growth, revealed this partnership as part of their initiative to support early-stage ventures. This selection positions Collide Capital at the forefront of the technology industry, underlining its role in propelling the next generation of innovators.

data.title: Cantor and Adam Back join forces to launch Bitcoin treasury firm, holding $3.5B in BTC through XXI.
data.description: Cantor Fitzgerald recently made a significant move in the Bitcoin market by introducing Twenty One (XXI) and is now partnering with Adam Back, an early Bitcoin investor, for another major Bitcoin treasury initiative.

data.title: Women's Health Diagnostics Market reaches $14.6B, with projections to 2030 highlighting growth in imaging, molecular diagnostics, and AI tools.
data.description: A detailed examination has uncovered new prospects in imaging, molecular diagnostics, and AI-powered tools as focus on women's health grows in worldwide healthcare plans. Based in Arlington, Va., on July 17, 2025, Kalorama Information, a prominent healthcare market research company, has highlighted these trends.

data.title: The MX Group names Paul Hirsch as first Chief Creative Officer, distinguishing itself in B2B market.
data.description: An independent agency in Burr Ridge, Illinois, reiterated its position as a dependable B2B growth partner designed to handle complexity rather than merging with others. Amid a trend of consolidation in the B2B agency sector, The MX Group stands out by choosing to grow independently. This agency is distinguishing itself by expanding its services and focusing on providing tailored solutions in the ever-changing B2B market. The announcement was made on July 17, 2025, highlighting the agency's commitment to remaining independent and dedicated to serving its clients effectively.

data.title: Century Complete to launch new home phase at Scenic Terrace in Polk County, FL. July 17, 2025.
data.description: A prominent company specializing in online home purchases has recently launched two new housing collections at Scenic Terrace in Polk County, Florida. The firm, recognized as a leading national homebuilder and known for its success in online home sales, unveiled the new collections in Haines City on July 17, 2025. Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), renowned for its innovative approach to homebuying, continues to expand its presence in the industry with this latest development.
